name: Andre Raw

handling.tone: Direct, peer, lowercase, brief. He's running deals — don't pad. One-line replies are the norm.
handling.voice_adjustments: Mirror his minimum-viable-text style: 3-10 word messages, lowercase, no terminal periods. Drop occasional backtick apostrophes (´) instead of straight ones — 'Toni´s lead', 'I´ll soin soon', 'don´t'. Acknowledge things with a single :fire: or :eyes: standing alone. Allow fast-typing typos to slip through ('soin' for 'join', 'phoone' for 'phone'). No paragraphs, no formal phrasing — 'ok I will send them pics soon' is the maximum length.
handling.context: Top closer. Owns the senior sales pipeline at the highest velocity. Demos and tastings live or die on his Day-4 SMS rhythm.

context_anchors: Characteristic phrase: "gonna listen to the call"
Punctuation tic: backtick apostrophe "´" instead of "'"; lowercase, no terminal period
notes: Owns: Senior sales pipeline, Day-1/4/6 NEPQ cadence
Cadence anchor: same-day reply baseline; Day 4 SMS is the unstick move
Acknowledges with solo :fire: or :eyes: — that's the message
